attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

attributes.name: minlength
attributes.description: This is a minimum value of the input.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: This is a maximum value of the input.

attributes.name: auto-height
attributes.description: Enables automatic height adjustment. The height will be confined within the min and max height if defined.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and eventually as visual label

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Sets the number of rows of the textarea

attributes.name: cols
attributes.description: Sets the number of cols of the textarea

attributes.name: wrap
attributes.description: Indicates how the control should wrap the value for form submission. If this attribute is not specified, soft is its default value.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: This is a name property of the `<uui-textarea>` component. It reflects the behaviour of the native `<textarea>` element and its name attribute.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Value of this form control.
If you dont want the setFormValue to be called on the ElementInternals, then prevent calling this method, by not calling super.value = newValue in your implementation of the value setter method.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Set to true if the component should have an error state. Property is reflected to the corresponding attribute.

attributes.name: pristine
attributes.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Defines the textarea placeholder.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disables the textarea.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

properties.name: minlength
properties.description: This is a minimum value of the input.

properties.name: minlengthMessage
properties.description: Minlength validation message.

properties.name: maxlength
properties.description: This is a maximum value of the input.

properties.name: maxlengthMessage
properties.description: Maxlength validation message.

properties.name: autoHeight
properties.description: Enables automatic height adjustment. The height will be confined within the min and max height if defined.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and eventually as visual label

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Sets the number of rows of the textarea

properties.name: cols
properties.description: Sets the number of cols of the textarea

properties.name: wrap
properties.description: Indicates how the control should wrap the value for form submission. If this attribute is not specified, soft is its default value.

properties.name: formAssociated
properties.description: This is a static class field indicating that the element is can be used inside a native form and participate in its events. It may require a polyfill, check support here https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/attachInternals.  Read more about form controls here https://web.dev/more-capable-form-controls/

properties.name: name
properties.description: This is a name property of the `<uui-textarea>` component. It reflects the behaviour of the native `<textarea>` element and its name attribute.

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Value of this form control.
If you dont want the setFormValue to be called on the ElementInternals, then prevent calling this method, by not calling super.value = newValue in your implementation of the value setter method.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

properties.name: requiredMessage
properties.description: Required validation message.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Set to true if the component should have an error state. Property is reflected to the corresponding attribute.

properties.name: errorMessage
properties.description: Custom error message.

properties.name: pristine
properties.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

cssProperties.name: --uui-textarea-min-height
cssProperties.description: Sets the minimum height of the textarea

cssProperties.name: --uui-textarea-max-height
cssProperties.description: Sets the maximum height of the textarea

cssProperties.name: --uui-textarea-background-color
cssProperties.description: Sets the background color of the textarea
